decisionPanels.title: Tonight's decision
decisionPanels.summary: Bias execution toward vertical-first output and search-native packaging; discovery surfaces are rewarding timely, utility-first video with strong early hooks.
actions: Ship one daily two-cut package per major story: 30-60s social cut + 90-150s context cut, both 9:16-first.
Add a 'search intent' metadata step in Launcher: plain-language audience query + entity tags + place tags before publish.
Set a 24h rapid postmortem loop for top 3 clips: first-2s hook, completion, shares/saves, and comment intent signals.

decisionPanels.title: Ops stack watch (iconik/LucidLink/Backlight)
decisionPanels.summary: Backlight/iconik macro signal is clear (scale + automation + vertical growth). iconik and LucidLink help centers remain anti-bot gated overnight, so exact changelog deltas must be manually verified in daylight.
actions: Morning verification pass: capture exact iconik panel/agent/ISG versions and LucidLink build notes into MMR risk log.
Translate automation signal into backlog: prioritize metadata automation and low-friction approvals over net-new tooling.
Prototype one external-review workflow with strict expiry/revoke controls to reduce review-cycle latency.

decisionPanels.title: Audience growth signal
decisionPanels.summary: YouTube and TikTok both reinforce active discovery behavior. Winning formats are trend-aware, quickly contextualized, and built for utility or emotional payoff within seconds.
actions: Use YouTube Shorts Trends + TikTok search cues as daily assignment inputs (not just post-publication analytics).
Design intros to answer 'why watch now?' in <2s with visible stakes and explicit context.
Create one weekly cross-desk experiment around non-core audience entry points (new communities/search pathways).

changes.summary: Decision model shifted from generic trend watch to discovery-native execution: search intent, 9:16 packaging velocity, and automation-first workflow reduction of review friction.
